title: Akademia Aktywnych i Kreatywnych®
description_short: Akademia Aktywnych i Kreatywnych® prowadzi w Krakowie zajęcia sportowe, kreatywne, artystyczne i rozwojowe dla dzieci oraz młodzieży. Oferta obejmuje między innymi robotykę LEGO®, sztuki walki, piłkę nożną, balet, jogę, rysunek, malarstwo, szycie oraz zajęcia sensoryczne.
description_long: Akademia Aktywnych i Kreatywnych® organizuje zajęcia dla dzieci od najmłodszych lat do wieku młodzieżowego, łącząc naukę przez zabawę z ruchem, twórczością i rozwijaniem samodzielności. / Dzieci mogą trenować sporty, budować i programować roboty LEGO®, tworzyć prace plastyczne, szyć własne projekty, tańczyć, ćwiczyć jogę oraz uczestniczyć w zajęciach sensorycznych i ogólnorozwojowych. / Programy skupiają się na rozwoju fizycznym, kreatywności, współpracy, pewności siebie i odkrywaniu mocnych stron dziecka.
image_prompt: ACTIVITY-000002 Akademia Aktywnych i Kreatywnych® Create a realistic, cinematic lifestyle class visual based primarily on this children’s activity organizer: Akademia Aktywnych i Kreatywnych. The image must clearly communicate the dominant activity or most representative children’s class offered by this organizer using the following context: Akademia Aktywnych i Kreatywnych runs sports, creative, artistic, and developmental classes for children and teenagers in Krakow, including LEGO robotics, martial arts, football, ballet, yoga, drawing, painting, sewing, and sensory play. Additional context: The organizer combines learning through play with movement, creativity, hands-on projects, and child development. Children build and program LEGO robots, make art, sew useful objects, dance, practice sports, explore sensory materials, and learn cooperation, confidence, focus, and independence. List of activities: martial arts;LEGO robotics;football;drawing and painting;ballet;jazz dance;woodworking workshops;sensory creative play;junior sports adventure;multi-sport classes;creative toy-building workshops;yoga;sewing studio. Activity type: Children, Classes. Show one single, coherent scene only. Focus on the main activity that best represents what children actually do during these classes. The scene should show a small group of children building and programming simple LEGO-style robots at a clean activity table, with blank screens, colorful bricks, wheels, gears, and small construction parts, making the robotics and hands-on learning immediately understandable. Do not create a collage, montage, split-screen, multi-panel composition, multiple frames, multiple scenes, or a sequence of moments. Show only one place, one moment, and one clear visual narrative. Keep the composition centered around children actively participating in the most representative class activity. Include a small natural group of children only if people are needed to show the activity. They should be relaxed, authentic, focused, and naturally interacting with the activity, instructor, tools, materials, equipment, or environment. Avoid staged posing, direct camera smiles, generic classroom scenes, and generic lifestyle portraits. If no people are needed, focus on the activity setup, objects, materials, equipment, and atmosphere that clearly define the class. Use a believable real-world setting related to the activity, with realistic detail, tactile materials, meaningful props, and a clean, uncluttered background. The image should feel warm, active, safe, authentic, and cinematic, like premium family lifestyle photography or a still from a gentle film. Use shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, a 50mm lens look, warm natural light, and a soft palette of warm neutrals and gentle pastels. Avoid close-up portraits, avoid generic playground scenes, avoid overly commercial posing, avoid crowded compositions, and avoid images where the class topic is unclear. The image should emphasize the dominant activity first and lifestyle mood second. Do not include any written language or typographic elements in the scene. No visible text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no captions, no signage, no labels, no posters, no book covers, no packaging text, no logos, no watermark. Keep all surfaces clean, blank, and unbranded. --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6 --s 100 --q 1 --chaos 0 --no collage, montage, diptych, triptych, split screen, multiple panels, multiple scenes, repeated subjects, text, words, letters, numbers, typography, signage, captions, labels, posters, logos, watermark, distorted hands, deformed faces, extra fingers, crowded composition, stiff pose, close-up portrait
